summary: First live cycle with the novelty gate hardened — form-canonicalisation plus a grown corpus of known results. Sixty-one conjectures over eight sub-cycles produced ten kernel-verified laws (all re-discharged against the kernel) and, for the first time, demoted three restatements as KNOWN — including a loosely-phrased cube-residue fact an earlier run had waved through. The promulgated laws remain classical (quartic identities and residues): with its habitual genre now recognised, the conjecturer migrated to a fresh textbook genre rather than to genuine novelty — locating the frontier upstream, in the proposer, not the checker.
